---
title: "Teaching"
subtitle: "Courses I support as a teaching assistant at Universidad del Norte"
description-meta: "Teaching experience of Andrés André Camargo Bertel at Universidad del Norte."
title-block-banner: false
---

As a Teaching Assistant at Universidad del Norte, I have taught and mentored undergraduate engineering students. Open-source course materials are on the way. The link below will go live soon.

## Thermodynamics

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9}
Fundamentals of energy, the laws of thermodynamics, properties of pure substances, and thermodynamic cycles, covering both Thermodynamics I and Thermodynamics II.
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
[Course site (coming soon)](coming-soon.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm role="button"}
:::
:::
